problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: If Enzymatic depolymerization of specific polymer is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
